common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.

legal.placeholderNote: This is placeholder copy. The final legal text is reviewed before MVP.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: We process your data to provide cloud storage (contract), to keep the service secure (legitimate interest), and — only with your consent — for analytics. We never sell your data. You can access, export, or delete your account from Account → Privacy.

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.body: By using the service you agree to these terms. You are responsible for the content you upload and for keeping your credentials secure. The service is provided as-is during the MVP period.

cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
cookies.body: Essential cookies (session, security, locale) are always on. Functional and analytics cookies are optional and off by default — manage them anytime from the cookie banner or this page.

dataProcessing.heading: Data Processing
dataProcessing.body: We use a limited set of sub-processors (storage backend, email, error monitoring) under data-processing agreements. International transfers rely on standard contractual clauses where applicable.

banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.description: Essential cookies keep the app running. Optional cookies help us improve it — the choice is yours.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back
login.twoFactorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: Enter your email and we’ll send a reset link.
reset.sentDescription: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
